svg.text: Fabric Agentic Workspace — Development & Deployment Workflow
Edit: TMDL · DAX · Notebooks · Pipelines · Reports
Test changes live in the Fabric portal
Run pipelines, validate semantic models, check reports
Make manual portal amendments alongside VS Code edits
Full history of every change — revert anytime
Configure prod-specific overrides in this branch:
Enable pipeline schedules, swap Lakehouse connections,
set SM parameters — commit once, persists across merges
Pull items from DEV workspace → local folder
Edit with AI agents or manually in VS Code
Push changes back to DEV workspace
Test in Fabric portal + make manual amendments
Happy? Commit to DevOps DEV branch
Not happy? Revert from DevOps to previous version
PR dev → prod branch, then sync to PROD workspace
